sidebarItem.className: group/memorySpace relative flex min-h-32 items-center gap-4 rounded-md pr-4 transition-colors duration-150 ease-out hover:bg-secondary focus-within:bg-secondary bg-secondary

breadcrumbWorkspace.name: 测试工作区1 记忆空间操作
breadcrumbWorkspace.className: inline-flex max-w-[220px] items-center gap-3 rounded-sm px-4 py-4 text-body-lg font-medium leading-body-lg text-muted-foreground outline-none transition-colors duration-150 ease-out hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background data-[state=open]:bg-secondary data-[state=open]:text-foreground

breadcrumbAny.label: 测试工作区1 记忆空间操作
breadcrumbAny.className: inline-flex max-w-[220px] items-center gap-3 rounded-sm px-4 py-4 text-body-lg font-medium leading-body-lg text-muted-foreground outline-none transition-colors duration-150 ease-out hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background data-[state=open]:bg-secondary data-[state=open]:text-foreground

breadcrumbAny.label: 测试灵感 记忆操作
breadcrumbAny.className: inline-flex max-w-[260px] items-center gap-3 rounded-sm px-4 py-4 text-body-lg font-medium leading-body-lg text-foreground outline-none transition-colors duration-150 ease-out hover:bg-secondary focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background data-[state=open]:bg-secondary

titlebarIconButtons.name: 新建记忆
titlebarIconButtons.className: inline-flex min-w-fit shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-8 border-0 text-ui-md font-medium leading-ui-md shadow-none outline-none transition-colors duration-150 ease-out focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:bg-muted disabled:text-muted-foreground disabled:opacity-100 size-32 rounded-sm p-0 bg-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm text-muted-foreground hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground

titlebarIconButtons.name: 展开记忆列表
titlebarIconButtons.className: inline-flex min-w-fit shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-8 border-0 text-ui-md font-medium leading-ui-md shadow-none outline-none transition-colors duration-150 ease-out focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:bg-muted disabled:text-muted-foreground disabled:opacity-100 size-32 rounded-sm p-0 bg-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm text-muted-foreground hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground

speedDialAction.className: p-speeddial-action grid size-[var(--reo-speed-dial-action-size)] place-items-center !rounded-full border-0 outline-none transition-colors duration-150 ease-out focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background bg-card text-foreground hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground

speedDialUnavailableAction.className: p-speeddial-action p-disabled grid size-[var(--reo-speed-dial-action-size)] place-items-center !rounded-full border-0 outline-none transition-colors duration-150 ease-out focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background cursor-default bg-card text-muted-foreground

fabTrigger.selector: button[aria-label="关闭表达入口"], button[aria-label="打开表达入口"]
fabTrigger.className: !size-[var(--reo-speed-dial-diameter)] !rounded-full !border-0 !bg-primary !text-primary-foreground !transition-colors !duration-200 !ease-out hover:!bg-primary focus-visible:!ring-2 focus-visible:!ring-ring focus-visible:!ring-offset-2 focus-visible:!ring-offset-background p-speeddial-button p-button-rounded p-button p-component p-button-icon-only
